title: After the Japan Derby: To All that is Present

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
—Around the 4th corner and onto the 
straights!! Who will stand at the top of 
this generation! It's a dash for hopes 
and dreams!

text_block_list.name: Stego Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Come On!!! Stay Goldーー!! 
Let's Goーーーーーーーー!!!

text_block_list.name: Stego Fan B
text_block_list.text:
That's it Stegoーー!!! 
You can't loseーー!!!

…The other world exists. 
I know that for certain.

A Japan Derby without Stay Gold. 
A Japan Derby Stay Gold could 
not participate.
That was the reality in the other world. In fact, this affair cemented itself as — a historical fact.
However… In this world of ours —!!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ————Haaaaaaaaaaaa!!!!

Stay Gold is running…!! She's running 
in the Japan Derby!!!

In this world, to my existence as Stay Gold's 
trainer, there is not a single thing that is 
more important than this ————
(Waaaaaaaaa———!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ahh……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: What a great scenery……

text_block_list.name: Stego's Fans
text_block_list.text: (Stay Goldーーーー!!!)

text_block_list.name: Stego Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That was seriously the coolest run 
I've ever seen!! Fantastic job!!!

text_block_list.name: Stego Fan D
text_block_list.text:
That was the greatest experience ever!! 
I'll be supporting you forever!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha… That was amazing…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —Everyoneee, thank youuu!
(Waaaaaaaaa———!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Fooooooooh!? W-W-What even happened just then…!? Stego was absolutely shimmering as she ran —

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my — Miss Fukukitaru, were you 
also able to feel it～?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You too!? Could it be that Stego is the 
incarnation of the Golden Blessing……!? 
Has she opened up the gates of fortunes 
for us all!?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Fufufu, I believe that may be close to the truth～ Indeed —

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have my complete faith in her power, 
and that my abilities will blossom 
further on the racetrack with her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Stego……Looked as if she was enjoying 
herself… She was incredibly fast and —

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Just like her… I want to be free just like her, 
and move forward… forward ————

Stay Gold had an incredible finish at the 
Japan Derby. Seeing her brimming with 
such magnificent confidence, my vision 
suddenly started to blur.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…If I was alone, I would never have 
made it this far.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's the first time I truly felt this way… 
that travelling with a partner could be 
a good thing.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ————Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm glad that you were my trainer.

Stay Gold is the embodiment of honesty. 
From her words to her conduct, she is a 
girl that always lives for the present 
moment. That's why —
choice_data_list: $(scale 95)Your journey will be even more fun from now
$(scale 95)Your journey will be even more fun from now

text_block_list.text:
I will also refrain from decorating my 
words. For the sake of everything we 
have together.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: That's the way.
————That night.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…So our next destination is the 
Kikuka Sho huh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To be here and return to a race I'm so 
familiar with is a bit of a strange feeling.
choice_data_list: I can feel this'll be a different Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.text:
…Or instead, is there a storm beckoning in 
the distance —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm looking forward to it.

The heat of summer has yet to shine, but 
one can still ponder at what's to come.

Will the Chrysanthemums of the race be 
blooming their usual color, or would it be…
